request_text: Fix pre-existing regression: lane auto-rebase halts with 'no classifier rule matched lanes.json'. The write-surface-coherence work dropped lanes.json from is_coordination_artifact_residue_path's residue set, but lanes.json is still coordination-owned in the auto-rebase reconciliation context (test_managed_planning_artifacts_are_resolved_deterministically expects R-COORDINATION-ARTIFACT-THEIRS). Restore correct lanes.json classification for lane auto-rebase.
